channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: A ‘true crime’ YouTube channel’s videos got millions of views. It turns out the stories were AI-generated
item.description: A popular “true crime” YouTube channel has been pulling in millions of views with videos about gruesome murders. As it turns out, none of them are real.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok returns to Apple and Google app stores in the US
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — TikTok has returned to the app stores of Apple and Google in the U.S., after President Donald Trump delayed the enforcement of a TikTok ban. TikTok, which is operated by Chinese technology firm ByteDance, was removed from Apple and Google’s app stores on Jan.
item.dc:creator: ZEN SOO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Netflix releases trailer for new western series Ransom Canyon and it looks like an exciting mix of Yellowstone and Virgin River
item.description: Netflix unveils trailer for new western series Ransom Canyon and it looks perfect for fans of Yellowstone and Virgin River.
item.dc:creator: grace.morris@futurenet.com (Grace Morris), TechRadar

item.title: China launches center to train 100-plus humanoid robots simultaneously
item.description: A humanoid robot training center has opened in Shanghai, a big step in China's efforts to become a global leader in robotics and artificial intelligence.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New iPhone 17 Pro rumor predicts bizarre new camera bar design, but we're far from convinced
item.description: A rumor suggests the iPhone 17 Pro could have a massive camera bar, and the iPhone 17 Pro Max could have a smaller Dynamic Island.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Your new Android notification superpower
item.description: It may seem like a paradox, but notifications are both the best and the worst part of owning an Android device. On the one hand, notifications let us stay on top of important incoming info — be it a critical Slack message, a personal family text, or an email from a high-priority client or colleague.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: BBVA permitirá gestionar por primera vez en España cuentas y tarjetas con IA
item.description: Blue, el asistente virtual de BBVA, arranca con hasta 150 consultas y operativas disponibles para clientes, lo que supone dar respuesta a más de 3.000 preguntas.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 8 tips for being a more decisive leader
item.description: When you lead a team, your people will turn to you to make the final call on a huge number of decisions. People admire a leader who is decisive. But decisiveness is challenging to master. You have to live with the decisions you make.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: 6 revealing stats about career challenges Black IT pros face
item.description: The Trump administration spent its first two weeks in office dismantling a raft of policies and agencies, including DEI programs from government and federal jobs, as well as removing data and reports on DEI topics from government websites.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Scout Motors' effort to directly sell its electric SUVs where they'll make them stalls
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — Legislation to let Volkswagen-backed Scout Motors sell its electric SUVs directly to people in South Carolina, where the vehicles will be built, has stalled after fierce opposition from traditional automobile dealers.
item.dc:creator: JEFFREY COLLINS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Plans to spend $400 million on ‘Armored Teslas’ vanish from State Department procurement list
item.description: Elon Musk’s unprecedented role in Donald Trump’s administration as overseer of government spending has raised questions about how he might police himself when one of his companies competes for official contracts.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Esports Olympics to debut in Saudi Arabia later than expected in 2027
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — The first Olympic Esports Games will be hosted in Riyadh in 2027, two years later than expected when a 12-year deal with Saudi Arabia was signed last year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Ukraine's rare earth elements could help keep US military aid flowing
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine has offered to strike a deal with U.S. President Donald Trump for continued American military aid in exchange for developing Ukraine’s mineral industry, which could provide a valuable source of the rare earth elements that are essential for many kinds of technology.
item.dc:creator: SAMYA KULLAB, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Review: Zencoder has a vision for AI coding
item.description: Zencoder is an AI coding assistant with interfaces to Visual Studio Code and JetBrains IDEs. It is designed to help developers ship products faster, much like GitHub Copilot, Amazon Q Developer, and Tabnine.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: C++, Go, and Rust gaining popularity – Tiobe
item.description: With Tiobe’s February 2025 rankings, the publisher of the monthly index of programming language popularity notes that fast programming languages such as C++, Go, and Rust are gaining ground.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: News influencers favored Trump over Harris during campaign, study finds
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Americans who followed news influencers during the presidential campaign were more likely to hear positive reports about Donald Trump than they were about Kamala Harris, a study has revealed.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Congress gets set to deal with artificial intelligence in health care
item.description: "AI is going to help kick in some of that load that the scientists and researchers do at the front end to quickly get a diagnosis," said Deema Tarazi. The post Congress gets set to deal with artificial intelligence in health care first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Is your camera ticket a fake? Here’s how to tell
item.description: Red light camera tickets: Not liable to ID the driver; some are fishing expeditions. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you fight back against tricky fake tickets.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's AI ambition and China's DeepSeek overshadow an AI summit in Paris
item.description: PARIS (AP) — The geopolitics of artificial intelligence will be in focus at a major summit in France where world leaders, executives and experts will hammer out pledges on guiding the development of the rapidly advancing technology.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIE CORBET and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
